chunks.title: Asa's Alliance with Aram
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Asa using temple treasures to secure a treaty with Ben-hadad against Baasha.

chunks.title: Hanani's Oracle and Asa's Reaction
chunks.reason: Combines the prophet's speech of judgment with the king's angry response and imprisonment.

chunks.title: Asa's Final Years and Death
chunks.reason: Historical summary of Asa's illness, his failure to seek God, and his burial.
